name: linSetGlobalInterByteSpace
title: linSetGlobalInterByteSpace
description: With this function it is possible to change the inter-byte space for all frame responses. Inter-byte space is the period between the end of the stop bit of the preceding byte and the start bit of the following byte.
By default the inter-byte space is 0.

parameters.name: sixteenthBits
parameters.description: Length of the inter-byte space to set [in units of 1/16th of bit time]. Value range: 0..65535. This corresponds to 0..4095.93 bit times. For a LIN standard compliance: The maximum space between the bytes cannot exceed 40% duration compared to nominal transmission time.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
